channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Opinion: TikTok case has staggering implications for free speech in America
item.description: D.C. court accepts claim that Chinese ownership threatens national security, but banning app amounts to censorship.
item.dc:creator: Erwin Chemerinsky, The Mercury News

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As AI makes its way into movies, Duncan Crabtree-Ireland is fighting for actors’ rights
item.description: After years of advocating for actors’ collective rights, Duncan Crabtree-Ireland is finally getting his own close-up.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Snow, Fast Company

item.title: YouTube is taking over TV
item.description: YouTube was launched in February 2005 and soon adopted a simple motto: “Broadcast Yourself.” While we initially watched on PCs, and then smartphones, it seems that these days an increasing number of us are engaging with YouTube content on our televisions.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Apple Intelligence arrives for the UK, Australia, Canada, New Zealand with iOS 18.2
item.description: Apple has released iOS 18.2, iPadOS 18.2, and macOS Sequoia 15.2, which means local language access to Apple Intelligence is now available to iPhone, Mac, and iPad users in the UK, Australia, Canada, New Zealand.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Go eclipses Node.js in web API requests, Cloudflare reports
item.description: Go has surpassed Node.js as the most popular language used for making automated API requests, according to cloud provider Cloudflare’s annual review of internet trends.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AT&T to eliminate landlines by 2029
item.description: Telecommunications company AT&T has announced plans to eliminate traditional copper wire-based landline phone service across all of its service areas in the United States over the next five years. The statement was made as part of a presentation to investors.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Energy prioritizes information sharing, AI for federated enterprise cybersecurity
item.description: The federated nature of the Energy Department's enterprise requires a focus on information sharing in order to identify and prevent cybersecurity events. The post Energy prioritizes information sharing, AI for federated enterprise cybersecurity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX
item.description: Michelyne LeBlanc, the deputy CIO of the Defense Commissary Agency, said the move to zero trust is all about ensuring customer confidence in its services. The post Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Don't get fooled by fake phone updates and notifications
item.description: Updates to apps are essential for maintaining the performance and security of your devices, including bug fixes, new features and security patches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
